note: ҫ /θ/, ӓ /æ/, ң /ŋ/ — three new letters
unaspirated b/j are voiceless → п/ч; tone 3 ◌̌, ң
ʱ breathy voice, а̄ length, ъ /ə/
а̨ /ɑ̃/ — the yus tail, by rule
ѩ /jɛ̃/ — the iotated yus, a ligature
х /x/ — the native х: all three H's in three names
ы comes back home; no silent ь
phonemic, not phonetic: reduction goes unwritten
ѕ /dz/ — alive in Macedonian, borrowed here
ą is the old nasal: the yus meets its own descendant
ѩ — the font fuses ьѧ by itself
